title: Member Spotlight: Three Months In
description: Single image post highlighting a community member's story and progress, paired with a short caption.
hook: Three months in: here's what changed first.

cta.text: Comment a 🌱 if you remember your day-one self

keyMessage: Real progress looks ordinary. That's the win.

imageSingle.hook: Three months in: here's what changed first.
imageSingle.creativeDirectionNotes: Natural light, mid-morning. Member at home — kitchen, living room, or porch. No studio polish. Looking off-camera, not posing. Candid > posed.
imageSingle.altText: A woman in her 40s laughing while standing in a sunlit kitchen, holding a mug, no makeup, hair pulled back.
